summary: Rewrite the local generated module path to the public-library module path and remove generated binary payloads.
reason: Published library CLIs use github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library/library/<category>/<slug> as their Go module path, and binary payloads under build/ are not publishable source artifacts.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passes after the import rewrite; no files remain under build/; simulated publish-package, binary-payload, and supply-chain verifiers pass.
